channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: No winners in Superlotto 6/49 and Ultra Lotto 6/58 draws on May 3, 2026
item.description: Walang nanalo sa jackpot prizes ng dalawang major lotto games ng Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) sa ginanap na draws noong Linggo, May 3, 2026. Ayon sa ulat, walang bettor ang nakakuha ng...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rainfall Across Multiple Counties Including Nairobi
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a weather advisory warning that several counties across the country will experience increased rainfall over the next 24 hours. The forecast covers ...

item.title: Sir Alex Ferguson taken to hospital as precaution after feeling unwell at Old Trafford
item.description: Sir Alex Ferguson was taken to hospital on Sunday after feeling unwell at Old Trafford prior to Manchester United’s Premier League match against Liverpool. The 84-year-old former manager, widely regar...

item.title: Urban growth in Africa outpaces planning, causing governance and infrastructure challenges
item.description: African cities dey grow quick, but di planning and governance systems never follow the pace, economists and urban experts dey warn. From Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam, Mombasa to Dodoma, cities dey expand o...

item.title: Hezbollah Suffers Heavy Losses Amid Ongoing Conflict with Israel
item.description: Since March 2, 2026, Hezbollah has suffered significant losses in its renewed conflict with Israel. The group has faced the occupation of parts of southern Lebanon, displacement of hundreds of thousan...

item.title: Collection of Notable Political Cartoons for 4 May 2026
item.description: This article from The Age presents a curated selection of political cartoons published on 4 May 2026. It highlights six illustrations that reflect current federal politics in Australia, offering both ...

item.title: Chalmers Aims for Net Savings in Upcoming Federal Budget Amid Spending Measures
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has announced plans for the upcoming May 12 Budget, promising to achieve net savings for the second consecutive year. The government aims to save more than it spends while still...

item.title: How organized crime once dominated the jukebox industry
item.description: This article explores a lesser-known chapter in music history when organized crime played a major role in controlling jukeboxes across North America. Beginning in the early 20th century, jukeboxes bec...

item.title: Sir Alex Ferguson receives hospital treatment before Manchester United versus Liverpool match
item.description: The provided content from the URL resulted in an access denied error, preventing retrieval of the full article. Based on the URL slug and related reports, Sir Alex Ferguson, the legendary former Manch...

item.title: ACT Government Focuses on Educating Public Transport Users Before Imposing Fines
item.description: Transport Canberra has ramped up ticket checks on public transport but is taking an educational approach rather than issuing fines for fare evasion. The ACT government is prioritising awareness and un...

item.title: Russia begins development of experimental anti-ageing gene therapy
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin don give order make scientists rush development of wetin dem dey call the world’s first anti-ageing vaccine. Di project dey part of Russia big national programme wey d...

item.title: Sydney man faces charges after fatal attack on family in Rosemeadow
item.description: A 32-year-old man has been charged with three counts of murder and one count of attempted murder following a violent incident at a family home in Rosemeadow, in Sydney’s south-west. Police were called...

item.title: Senate Prepares to Discuss Anti-Dynasty, Transparency, and Key Economic Measures
item.description: As the Philippine Senate resumes session on Monday, May 4, lawmakers are set to prioritize a number of key measures focusing on governance, political reform, and economic development. Foremost on the ...

item.title: Calumpit, Bulacan Residents Win P1 Million Jackpot on 'Everybody Sing' TV Show
item.description: Residents of Calumpit, Bulacan recently celebrated winning a P1 million jackpot on the popular Philippine game show 'Everybody Sing,' hosted by Vice Ganda. The event brought excitement and joy to the ...

item.title: A History of Claymation: Key Films and Artists That Defined the Medium
item.description: Claymation, a form of stop-motion animation using clay figures, has captivated audiences for over a century due to its tactile, handmade charm. Beginning with early experiments like The Sculptor’s Wel...

item.title: Understanding the Layers of Humour and Ruination in Hrabal’s Closely Watched Trains
item.description: The article reflects on Bohumil Hrabal’s 1965 novella, Closely Watched Trains, through the lens of humour and ruination. The author, Ravi Shankar Shukla, first read the novella in a fragmented manner,...

item.title: Fadiel Adams alleges police task team raided former Mitchells Plain home in error
item.description: National Coloured Congress (NCC) leader Fadiel Adams has accused members of the Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) of raiding the wrong house in Mitchells Plain while allegedly searching for him. Spe...

item.title: Study identifies a severe form of ADHD with intense behavioural reactions
item.description: Recent research has highlighted a more severe and less recognised form of ADHD, distinct from the classic presentation of inattentive or hyperactive children. While the stereotypical ADHD child may be...

item.title: APC Elders in Kwara Back Bolarinwa as Governorship Candidate for 2027
item.description: Elders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) from all three senatorial districts in Kwara State don gather and officially endorse Bashir Bolarinwa as their choice for the 2027 governorship election. ...

item.title: Two adults killed in suspicious house explosion in Bristol
item.description: Early on Sunday morning, an explosion occurred at a residential property on Sterncourt Road, Frenchay, Bristol, resulting in the deaths of two adults. Avon and Somerset Police have classified the caus...
